title: Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins — Chapter 862
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 146 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
key_events: The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
